'''''Yali''''' was a [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser|MC80 ''Liberty'' type]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
She was one of the last capital ships to leave for the new Rebel base in [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], with [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']]. The two cruisers were attacked by Imperial frigates ''[[Fear]]'', ''[[Hate]]'', [[Fury (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Fury'']], and ''[[Spite]]''. However, they both made it to hyperspace, destroying all of them.
